commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Contributor-side current-head proof plus maintainer Policy/security review are required before any repair or merge path.; Needs attention: malformed secrets/auth policy container values can bypass the new conformance rules instead of producing invalid-policy findings.; Review finding: [P1] Validate the secrets policy container — extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.ts:1159-1160 - [P2] Validate auth policy container... (sha=59696e9785efe63c3e3072a22e72efe2f723a98d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR extends the bundled Policy plugin, docs, and tests with redacted secrets/auth-profile evidence and six new config-level doctor/policy conformance findings, plus a test-only health-check registry reset export.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings by source inspection: malformed `secrets`, `auth`, or `auth.profiles` containers hit early `return []` guards and are not covered by the existing container-shape validator. I did not execute tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor-side current-head proof plus maintainer Policy/security review are required before any repair or merge path.

target.title: Policy: add secrets auth provenance checks
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a Policy 1.0 secrets/auth provenance category with redacted config-derived evidence and doctor/lint findings.

Logical base: #80783 after the signed oc-path evidence fix. This PR intentionally skips #81104 and does not include runtime audit, gateway protocol, approval metadata, Swift protocol, or before-tool-call changes.

- Records secret provider/input provenance without exposing secret values.
- Enforces `secrets.disallowInline`, `secrets.requireManagedProviders`, `secrets.denySources`, and `secrets.allowInsecureProviders`.
- Adds auth profile metadata/mode checks with `auth.profiles.requireMetadata` and `auth.profiles.allowModes`.
- Documents the new policy rules and JSON evidence shape.

## Safety

This is config-level conformance only. `doctor --lint` and `policy check` read existing OpenClaw config and report findings. This PR does not mutate config, contact secret providers, read secret values, change credential resolution, or add runtime enforcement.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: adds policy conformance evidence and findings for configured secret/auth provenance without exposing raw secret material, including inline secrets, unmanaged SecretRef providers, denied provider sources, insecure secret providers, missing auth-profile metadata, and unapproved auth-profile modes.

Real environment tested: Windows source worktree restacked on the signed #80783 head `66495f031f`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

- `node --no-maglev node_modules\vitest\vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/cli.test.ts --run --reporter=dot`
- `node node_modules\@typescript\native-preview\bin\tsgo.js -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test-policy-81974-config.tsbuildinfo`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx -- docs/cli/policy.md docs/plugins/reference/policy.md`
- `git diff --check giodl73-repo/policy-conformance-examples...HEAD`

Evidence after fix:

![PR #81974 secrets/auth provenance before/after proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-81974-fresh/pr-81974/pr-81974-secrets-auth-provenance-before-after-proof.png)

Observed result after fix: focused policy doctor/CLI tests passed 2 files and 79 tests. Extension tsgo, docs MDX, and diff whitespace checks passed. Head commit `3607c62364` is GitHub-verified signed.

What was not tested: no live external vault or credential provider was contacted. The proof verifies policy doctor/lint behavior against config/policy files and redaction behavior.

## Related

- #80783 — Policy: add model, network, and MCP conformance checks
- #81981 — Policy: add gateway exposure checks
target.author: giodl73-repo
